## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss ongoing client projects, team updates, and address challenges with AI-assisted content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New business landed, including a significant partnership with a buzzy Silicon Valley company (competitor to Scale AI)](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated content and writing guidelines persist, affecting deliverables for some clients](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Post-termination engagements are sometimes costing resources long after client payments cease](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Client portfolio health is generally stable, with some accounts (e.g., Aimbit) potentially shifting between pods](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Generation Challenges

  - [Saskia struggling with writing guidelines and AI-generated artifacts for Prophecy](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Jürgen spent significant time "fighting with AI" to follow guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Suggestion to replace research step directives entirely for better results](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Tip: Use assignment creation field as a prompt rather than just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/-kszF9xcsnApw2pyyMxSe6cFgzbyrUZj?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
